title: What's new with Gemini from Google DeepMind
summary: Google DeepMind announces updates to Gemini 3, featuring upgraded model reasoning, expanded context window processing, and enhanced multimodal tool use. The session showcases workflows for building and scaling agentic applications through Vertex AI, with research advancements in agent design.
writeup: The video covers Google DeepMind's updates to Gemini 3, including improved model reasoning, an expanded context window, and stronger multimodal tool use. It demonstrates workflows on Vertex AI for building and scaling agentic applications, alongside research advances in agent design. The takeaways center on how the upgraded reasoning and context handling support agent orchestration for enterprise use.
